data.title: Construction permits received for 2 grocery stores in Vilnius and Pabradė by AB Tewox companies; secured long-term leases.
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, on January 16, 2026, it was announced that two businesses overseen by AB Tewox have been granted licenses for the establishment of two fresh supermarket outlets in Vilnius and Pabradė. These ventures have also finalized extended lease contracts, ensuring their sustainability.

data.title: Wall Street analysts raise expectations for BOK Financial Corp ($BOKF) ahead of Q4 earnings, expecting $2.16 per share and $549.37 million revenue, up from $2.12 and $525.56 million last year. Shares closed at $127.69, up 2.1% on Thursday.
data.description: BOK Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: BOKF) is set to unveil its fourth-quarter earnings report on Friday, January 16. Analysts are projecting a rise in earnings to $2.16 per share compared to $2.12 per share in the previous year. Revenue is expected to reach $549.37 million for the quarter, up from $525.56 million a year ago. The third quarter results posted on Oct. 20 exceeded expectations. Closing at $127.69 on Thursday, BOK Financial shares saw a 2.1% increase. For further details, including the latest analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: SUI price at $1.78, RSI 56.89. Forecasting breakout to $2.07 by Feb 2026 if $1.75 support holds. Technical analysis suggests $2.07-$2.42 range.
data.description: The current trading price of Sui is $1.78, and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral level of 56.89. Analysts predict a potential breakout to a range of $2.07-$2.42 if buyers can maintain support at $1.75 until the end of February.

data.title: Price of OP expected to reach $0.37-$0.42 by Feb 2026. Current at $0.34 with potential rise if resistance overcome. MACD signals bearish.
data.description: The current momentum of Optimism (OP) is neutral at $0.34. Technical indicators indicate a possible increase to the range of $0.37 to $0.42 if key resistance is surpassed. However, bearish MACD signals advise caution in the market.

data.title: M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) to release Q4 earnings on Jan. 16; Forecasted EPS $4.47 (up from $3.77) and revenue $2.47 billion. Share price at $212.57.
data.description: M&T Bank Corporation will unveil its Q4 earnings on Friday, Jan. 16. Analysts predict earnings to reach $4.47 per share, up from $3.77 per share last year. The expected revenue for the quarter is $2.47 billion, an increase from $2.38 billion in the previous year. M&T Bank exceeded expectations in Q3 earnings on Oct. 16. As of Thursday, the company's shares closed at $212.57, marking a 1.3% increase. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, visit Benzinga.

data.title: ARB price forecast: Expected to reach $0.25-$0.28 by Feb 2026. Current price at $0.21 with potential 19-33% increase in 3-4 weeks.
data.description: Arbitrum's (ARB) current price stands at $0.21, indicating neutral momentum. Analysts predict a potential increase of 19-33% in the next 3-4 weeks, bringing the price to the range of $0.25-$0.28. Despite some mixed technical signals, the outlook remains positive for Arbitrum.

data.title: NCAA urges CFTC to tighten rules on college sport prediction markets, including age restrictions and anti-harassment measures.
data.description: The NCAA is urging the CFTC to implement stricter regulations on prediction markets for college sports. The proposed rules include restrictions on age and advertising, as well as measures to prevent harassment. The NCAA is emphasizing the importance of protecting the integrity of college sports and ensuring fair participation in these markets.

data.title: APT price predicted to reach $2.25-$2.43 by January 2026 with potential gains of 25-35% despite current consolidation at $1.80.
data.description: A cryptocurrency called Aptos (APT) is predicted to experience a growth potential of between 25% to 35%. Analysts have set price targets for the coin between $2.25 and $2.43 by the end of the month, despite its current value being $1.80. This suggests an opportunity for investors to potentially gain from the coin's anticipated increase in value.
